source.name: gstack by Garry Tan
source.license_notes: MIT ‚Äî backend delivery pipeline generalized from gstack's ship/land-and-deploy/canary/document-release

goal: Adapt the Think‚ÜíPlan‚ÜíBuild‚ÜíReview‚ÜíTest‚ÜíShip‚ÜíReflect agentic delivery pipeline for backend/API projects with backend-specific review gates (API design, database, security, DX) and release pipeline (migration‚Üídeploy‚Üíhealth check‚Üícanary‚Üídocument).
when_to_use: New backend API endpoint or service development
steps: Think: redefine the backend problem ‚Äî what API endpoints are needed? Can existing services handle this?
Plan: design API contract, database migration, data flow, test strategy; pass Eng/DX/Security gates as applicable
Build: write migration first ‚Üí model ‚Üí repository ‚Üí service ‚Üí controller; tests in parallel
Review: PR review against backend rules; security scan for SQL injection/XSS/CSRF; DX audit for API consistency
Test: unit tests (service/repository), integration tests (API endpoint + DB), performance test if needed
Ship: sync main‚Üítests‚Üípush‚ÜíPR‚Üímerge‚Üírun migration‚Üídeploy‚Üíhealth check‚Üícanary monitor‚Üíupdate docs
Reflect: record API design decisions, performance findings, security lessons; update backend rules
prompt_contract: Migration must be written and reviewed before controller code
All external input must be validated (backend-security-checklist)
API responses must follow unified format (api-design-rules)
Database queries must use parameterized queries
Ship gate includes migration execution and rollback plan
verification: Migration applied successfully in target environment
Canary monitor shows no new errors for 5-30 minutes
failure_modes: Skipping migration review ‚Äî irreversible schema changes
Deploying without rollback plan for migration
Not updating API documentation after changes
Skipping security review for endpoints handling user data
handoff_report: Deployment status and health check result

quality.notes: Backend-specific adaptation of gstack's delivery pipeline. Use this alongside backend rules (api-design, database-modeling, auth, security, deployment) for complete backend project guidance.

retrieval.ai_summary: Backend-adapted agentic software delivery pipeline: Think‚ÜíPlan (API design + DB migration + security review)‚ÜíBuild (migration‚Üímodel‚Üírepo‚Üíservice‚Üícontroller)‚ÜíReview (backend rules compliance)‚ÜíTest (unit+integration+security)‚ÜíShip (migration‚Üídeploy‚Üíhealth check‚Üícanary)‚ÜíReflect. Use with backend/api-design, database-modeling, auth, security, deployment rules.
